name: Tutti-Frutti Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a container of blender and process until smooth.
2. Pour the strawberry mixture into a large pitcher and add water. Cover and chill for at least 3 hours.
3. To serve, add seltzer to the juice mixture and stir gently. Serve immediately.
Note: Serving size is approximately 1/2 cup, with 37 calories and 0.1 grams of fat.
